full_name: Rolled steels for welded structure - grade SM490A
scope: Weldable structural carbon steel for bridges, ships, offshore and welded construction. Higher strength than SS400 with controlled composition for weldability. '490' denotes minimum tensile strength in N/mm2; suffix A/B/C denotes toughness class.

mechanical_properties.charpy_impact: SM490A no requirement; SM490B >= 27 J at 0C; SM490C >= 27 J at 0C

license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted JIS document text
